gxpci_dma_cmd_t Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

A structure used to post DMA commands. More...


Data Fields

void * buffer
 Buffer virtual address.
uint32_t size:GXPCI_MAX_CMD_SIZE_BITS
 Size of the buffer, maximum 16KB for Gx36.
uint32_t reserved:(32 - GXPCI_MAX_CMD_SIZE_BITS)
 Must be zero.
uint32_t remote_buf_offset
 Offset in bytes of the remote target buffer's PCI address from the base PCI address of the host's Raw DMA buffer.

Detailed Description

A structure used to post DMA commands.

Field Documentation

void* gxpci_dma_cmd_t::buffer

Buffer virtual address.

uint32_t gxpci_dma_cmd_t::size

Size of the buffer, maximum 16KB for Gx36.

Any values larger than 16KB will be treated as 16KB.

uint32_t gxpci_dma_cmd_t::reserved

Must be zero.

uint32_t gxpci_dma_cmd_t::remote_buf_offset

Offset in bytes of the remote target buffer's PCI address from the base PCI address of the host's Raw DMA buffer.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
  • gxpci/gxpci.h
